name: TODO Stack Scaffolder
description: Writes project scaffold: root package.json, tsconfig files, vite config, folder structure for a React + NestJS monorepo

checks.prompt:
You are scaffolding a TODO app monorepo using pnpm workspaces.

Stack:
- Frontend: React 18 + Vite + Redux Toolkit + Redux Saga + TypeScript
- Backend: NestJS 10 + SQL.js (in-memory SQLite via sql.js npm package) + TypeScript
- Design: Atomic Design (atoms / molecules / organisms / templates / pages)
- Style: CSS Modules

Write ALL files listed below using write_file. Use relative paths from the project root.

## Files to write

### Root
- `todo-app/package.json` — pnpm workspace root, workspaces: ["packages/*"], no root deps
- `todo-app/pnpm-workspace.yaml` — lists packages/*
- `todo-app/tsconfig.base.json` — strict TS config, target ES2022, moduleResolution bundler

### Backend package
- `todo-app/packages/backend/package.json` — name @todo/backend, deps: @nestjs/core @nestjs/common @nestjs/platform-express @nestjs/mapped-types sql.js reflect-metadata rxjs; devDeps: @nestjs/cli typescript ts-node @types/node @types/sql.js; scripts: start:dev/start/build
- `todo-app/packages/backend/tsconfig.json` — extends ../../tsconfig.base.json, add emitDecoratorMetadata: true, experimentalDecorators: true, outDir dist

### Frontend package
- `todo-app/packages/frontend/package.json` — name @todo/frontend, deps: react react-dom redux @reduxjs/toolkit redux-saga; devDeps: vite @vitejs/plugin-react typescript @types/react @types/react-dom; scripts: dev/build/preview
- `todo-app/packages/frontend/tsconfig.json` — extends ../../tsconfig.base.json, jsx: react-jsx
- `todo-app/packages/frontend/tsconfig.node.json` — for vite.config.ts, moduleResolution Node
- `todo-app/packages/frontend/vite.config.ts` — React plugin, server port 3000, proxy /api to http://localhost:3001
- `todo-app/packages/frontend/index.html` — minimal HTML entry, mounts #root

After writing each file, use list_dir on todo-app/ to verify the structure.

Do NOT generate placeholder TODO comments — write complete, valid content for every file.

checks.fail: ❌ Root package.json missing — scaffold did not run
